Now let me add the error styles to the Register screen:


```javascript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  TextInput,
  TouchableOpacity,
  StyleSheet,
  Alert,
  KeyboardAvoidingView,
  Platform,
  ScrollView,
  Dimensions,
} from 'react-native';
import { LinearGradient } from 'expo-linear-gradient';
import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows } from '../styles/designSystem';

const RegisterScreen = ({ navigation }) => {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const { register } = useAuth();

  const validateForm = () => {
    const newErrors = {};
    
    if (!email.trim()) {
      newErrors.email = 'Email is required';
    } else if (!/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(email)) {
      newErrors.email = 'Please enter a valid email address';
    }
    
    if (!password.trim()) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password is required';
    } else if (password.length < 6) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password must be at least 6 characters';
    }
    
    if (!confirmPassword.trim()) {
      newErrors.confirmPassword = 'Please confirm your password';
    } else if (password !== confirmPassword) {
      newErrors.confirmPassword = 'Passwords do not match';
    }
    
    setErrors(newErrors);
    return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
  };

  const handleRegister = async () => {
    if (!validateForm()) return;

    setIsLoading(true);
    setErrors({});
    
    try {
      const result = await register(email.trim(), password);
      
      if (result.success) {
        Alert.alert('Success', result.message);
        // Navigation will be handled by AuthProvider
      } else {
        Alert.alert('Registration Failed', result.message);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'An unexpected error occurred');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const navigateToLogin = () => {
    navigation.navigate('Login');
  };

  const { width, height } = Dimensions.get('window');

  return (
    <KeyboardAvoidingView 
      style={styles.container} 
      behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'}
    >
      <ScrollView 
        contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContainer}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Header with Gradient */}
        <LinearGradient
          colors={['#8B5CF6', '#EC4899']}
          style={[styles.header, { height: height * 0.35 }]}
        >
          <View style={styles.headerContent}>
            <Text style={styles.appTitle}>中文词汇</Text>
            <Text style={styles.appSubtitle}>Chinese Vocabulary</Text>
            <Text style={styles.welcomeText}>Join Our Community</Text>
          </View>
        </LinearGradient>

        {/* Form Container */}
        <View style={styles.formContainer}>
          <View style={styles.formCard}>
            <Text style={styles.formTitle}>Create Account</Text>
            <Text style={styles.formSubtitle}>Start your Chinese learning journey today</Text>
            
            <View style={styles.form}>
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Email Address</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.email && styles.inputError]}
                  value={email}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setEmail(text);
                    if (errors.email) {
                      setErrors({...errors, email: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your email"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  keyboardType="email-address"
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                  autoCorrect={false}
                />
                {errors.email && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.email}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.password && styles.inputError]}
                  value={password}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setPassword(text);
                    if (errors.password) {
                      setErrors({...errors, password: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your password (min 6 characters)"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.password && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.password}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Confirm Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.confirmPassword && styles.inputError]}
                  value={confirmPassword}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setConfirmPassword(text);
                    if (errors.confirmPassword) {
                      setErrors({...errors, confirmPassword: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Confirm your password"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.confirmPassword && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.confirmPassword}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.button, isLoading && styles.buttonDisabled]}
                onPress={handleRegister}
                disabled={isLoading}
                activeOpacity={0.8}
              >
                <LinearGradient
                  colors={isLoading ? [colors.gray400, colors.gray400] : ['#8B5CF6', '#EC4899']}
                  style={styles.buttonGradient}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.buttonText}>
                    {isLoading ? 'Creating Account...' : 'Create Account'}
                  </Text>
                </LinearGradient>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.footer}>
            <Text style={styles.footerText}>Already have an account? </Text>
            <TouchableOpacity onPress={navigateToLogin} activeOpacity={0.7}>
              <Text style={styles.linkText}>Sign In</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </KeyboardAvoidingView>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background,
  },
  scrollContainer: {
    flexGrow: 1,
  },
  header: {
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
  },
  headerContent: {
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  appTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['4xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.white,
    marginBottom: spacing.xs,
  },
  appSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.lg,
    color: colors.white,
    opacity: 0.9,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  welcomeText: {
    fontSize: typography.xl,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.white,
  },
  formContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
    paddingTop: spacing.xl,
  },
  formCard: {
    backgroundColor: colors.surface,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,
    padding: spacing.xl,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
    ...shadows.lg,
  },
  formTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['2xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  formSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.xl,
  },
  form: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  inputContainer: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  label: {
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  input: {
    backgroundColor: colors.gray50,
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: colors.gray200,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    padding: spacing.md,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  inputError: {
    borderColor: colors.error,
    backgroundColor: '#FEF2F2',
  },
  errorText: {
    color: colors.error,
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    marginTop: spacing.xs,
    marginLeft: spacing.xs,
  },
  button: {
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    marginTop: spacing.md,
    overflow: 'hidden',
  },
  buttonGradient: {
    padding: spacing.md,
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  buttonDisabled: {
    opacity: 0.6,
  },
  buttonText: {
    color: colors.white,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
  footer: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingVertical: spacing.lg,
  },
  footerText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
  },
  linkText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.primary,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
});

export default RegisterScreen;

```

## **Step 3: Create Validation Testing Guide**


```markdown
# Form Validation Testing Guide

## 🧪 Validation Features Added

### **Login Screen Validation:**
- ✅ Email format validation
- ✅ Password length validation (minimum 6 characters)
- ✅ Required field validation
- ✅ Real-time error clearing when user types
- ✅ Visual error indicators (red border, error text)

### **Register Screen Validation:**
- ✅ Email format validation
- ✅ Password length validation (minimum 6 characters)
- ✅ Password confirmation matching
- ✅ Required field validation
- ✅ Real-time error clearing when user types
- ✅ Visual error indicators (red border, error text)

## 🔍 Testing Scenarios

### **Login Screen Tests:**

#### 1. **Empty Fields Test:**
- Leave email and password empty
- Click "Sign In" button
- **Expected:** Red borders on both fields with error messages
- **Error Messages:** "Email is required" and "Password is required"

#### 2. **Invalid Email Test:**
- Enter invalid email (e.g., "test" or "test@")
- Enter valid password
- Click "Sign In" button
- **Expected:** Red border on email field with error message
- **Error Message:** "Please enter a valid email address"

#### 3. **Short Password Test:**
- Enter valid email
- Enter password less than 6 characters
- Click "Sign In" button
- **Expected:** Red border on password field with error message
- **Error Message:** "Password must be at least 6 characters"

#### 4. **Valid Input Test:**
- Enter valid email and password
- Click "Sign In" button
- **Expected:** API request sent to backend, no validation errors

### **Register Screen Tests:**

#### 1. **Empty Fields Test:**
- Leave all fields empty
- Click "Create Account" button
- **Expected:** Red borders on all fields with error messages
- **Error Messages:** "Email is required", "Password is required", "Please confirm your password"

#### 2. **Invalid Email Test:**
- Enter invalid email
- Enter valid passwords
- Click "Create Account" button
- **Expected:** Red border on email field with error message
- **Error Message:** "Please enter a valid email address"

#### 3. **Short Password Test:**
- Enter valid email
- Enter password less than 6 characters
- Enter matching confirm password
- Click "Create Account" button
- **Expected:** Red border on password field with error message
- **Error Message:** "Password must be at least 6 characters"

#### 4. **Password Mismatch Test:**
- Enter valid email
- Enter valid password (6+ characters)
- Enter different confirm password
- Click "Create Account" button
- **Expected:** Red border on confirm password field with error message
- **Error Message:** "Passwords do not match"

#### 5. **Valid Input Test:**
- Enter valid email, password, and matching confirm password
- Click "Create Account" button
- **Expected:** API request sent to backend, no validation errors

## 🎨 Visual Feedback Features

### **Error States:**
- **Red Border:** Input fields with errors show red border
- **Light Red Background:** Error fields have light red background
- **Error Text:** Red error message appears below each field
- **Real-time Clearing:** Errors clear as user types in the field

### **Success States:**
- **Normal Border:** Valid fields show normal gray border
- **Normal Background:** Valid fields have light gray background
- **No Error Text:** No error messages for valid fields

## 🔄 Real-time Validation

### **Error Clearing Behavior:**
1. User sees validation error
2. User starts typing in the field
3. Error message disappears immediately
4. Field returns to normal state
5. User can continue typing

### **Validation Timing:**
- **On Submit:** Validation runs when user clicks submit button
- **Real-time Clearing:** Errors clear as user types
- **No Live Validation:** Errors don't appear while typing (only on submit)

## 🧪 Test Cases Summary

| Test Case | Input | Expected Result |
|-----------|-------|----------------|
| Empty email | "" | "Email is required" |
| Invalid email | "test" | "Please enter a valid email address" |
| Empty password | "" | "Password is required" |
| Short password | "123" | "Password must be at least 6 characters" |
| Password mismatch | "pass123" vs "pass456" | "Passwords do not match" |
| Valid input | Valid email + 6+ char password | No errors, API call made |

## 🚀 Expected User Experience

1. **User enters invalid data** → Clicks submit → Sees red borders and error messages
2. **User starts typing in error field** → Error message disappears immediately
3. **User enters valid data** → Clicks submit → No validation errors, API call made
4. **User sees success/error alerts** → Based on API response

## 🔧 Technical Implementation

- **State Management:** `errors` state object tracks field-specific errors
- **Validation Function:** `validateForm()` checks all fields and sets errors
- **Real-time Clearing:** `onChangeText` handlers clear errors as user types
- **Visual Feedback:** Conditional styling based on error state
- **Error Messages:** Dynamic error text display below each field
```

## ✅ **Form Validation Issues Fixed!**

I've implemented comprehensive form validation with visual feedback for both login and register screens:

### **🔧 Validation Features Added:**

1. **Real-time Error Display:**
   - Red borders on invalid fields
   - Light red background for error fields
   - Error messages below each field
   - Errors clear as user types

2. **Comprehensive Validation:**
   - **Email:** Required + format validation
   - **Password:** Required + minimum 6 characters
   - **Confirm Password:** Required + must match password

3. **User Experience Improvements:**
   - No more silent validation failures
   - Clear visual feedback for all errors
   - Real-time error clearing
   - Professional error styling

### **🧪 Test the Validation:**

**Login Screen:**
- Try empty fields → Red borders + error messages
- Try invalid email → "Please enter a valid email address"
- Try short password → "Password must be at least 6 characters"
- Try valid input → No errors, API call made

**Register Screen:**
- Try empty fields → Red borders + error messages
- Try invalid email → "Please enter a valid email address"
- Try short password → "Password must be at least 6 characters"
- Try password mismatch → "Passwords do not match"
- Try valid input → No errors, API call made

### **🎨 Visual Feedback:**

- **Error State:** Red border + light red background + error text
- **Normal State:** Gray border + light gray background + no error text
- **Real-time:** Errors clear immediately when user starts typing

**Now users will see clear validation feedback and know exactly what needs to be fixed before the form submits to the backend!**

---

**User**

Now the frontend validation is fixed, but the when the there should be proper toast messages for success or failure of API calls. Currently, both forms do not have toast messages on success or failure.

---

**Cursor**

You're absolutely right! The current implementation only shows Alert dialogs, but we need proper toast messages for better UX. Let me implement a toast notification system.

## **Step 1: Create Toast Notification Component**


```javascript
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  Animated,
  Dimensions,
  TouchableOpacity,
} from 'react-native';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows } from '../styles/designSystem';

const Toast = ({ 
  visible, 
  message, 
  type = 'success', 
  duration = 3000, 
  onHide 
}) => {
  const translateY = useRef(new Animated.Value(-100)).current;
  const opacity = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current;

  useEffect(() => {
    if (visible) {
      // Show toast
      Animated.parallel([
        Animated.timing(translateY, {
          toValue: 0,
          duration: 300,
          useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
        Animated.timing(opacity, {
          toValue: 1,
          duration: 300,
          useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
      ]).start();

      // Auto hide after duration
      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
        hideToast();
      }, duration);

      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    } else {
      hideToast();
    }
  }, [visible]);

  const hideToast = () => {
    Animated.parallel([
      Animated.timing(translateY, {
        toValue: -100,
        duration: 300,
        useNativeDriver: true,
      }),
      Animated.timing(opacity, {
        toValue: 0,
        duration: 300,
        useNativeDriver: true,
      }),
    ]).start(() => {
      if (onHide) {
        onHide();
      }
    });
  };

  if (!visible) return null;

  const getToastStyle = () => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'success':
        return {
          backgroundColor: colors.success,
          borderLeftColor: colors.successLight,
        };
      case 'error':
        return {
          backgroundColor: colors.error,
          borderLeftColor: colors.errorLight,
        };
      case 'warning':
        return {
          backgroundColor: colors.warning,
          borderLeftColor: colors.secondaryLight,
        };
      case 'info':
        return {
          backgroundColor: colors.info,
          borderLeftColor: colors.primaryLight,
        };
      default:
        return {
          backgroundColor: colors.success,
          borderLeftColor: colors.successLight,
        };
    }
  };

  const getIcon = () => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'success':
        return '✅';
      case 'error':
        return '❌';
      case 'warning':
        return '⚠️';
      case 'info':
        return 'ℹ️';
      default:
        return '✅';
    }
  };

  return (
    <Animated.View
      style={[
        styles.container,
        {
          transform: [{ translateY }],
          opacity,
        },
      ]}
    >
      <View style={[styles.toast, getToastStyle()]}>
        <TouchableOpacity
          style={styles.toastContent}
          onPress={hideToast}
          activeOpacity={0.8}
        >
          <Text style={styles.icon}>{getIcon()}</Text>
          <Text style={styles.message}>{message}</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      </View>
    </Animated.View>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    position: 'absolute',
    top: 50,
    left: spacing.md,
    right: spacing.md,
    zIndex: 1000,
  },
  toast: {
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    borderLeftWidth: 4,
    ...shadows.lg,
  },
  toastContent: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    alignItems: 'center',
    padding: spacing.md,
  },
  icon: {
    fontSize: typography.lg,
    marginRight: spacing.sm,
  },
  message: {
    flex: 1,
    color: colors.white,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    fontWeight: typography.medium,
    lineHeight: typography.normal * typography.base,
  },
});

export default Toast;
```

## **Step 2: Create Toast Context**


```javascript
import React, { createContext, useContext, useState } from 'react';
import Toast from '../components/Toast';

const ToastContext = createContext({});

export const useToast = () => {
  const context = useContext(ToastContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error('useToast must be used within a ToastProvider');
  }
  return context;
};

export const ToastProvider = ({ children }) => {
  const [toast, setToast] = useState({
    visible: false,
    message: '',
    type: 'success',
    duration: 3000,
  });

  const showToast = (message, type = 'success', duration = 3000) => {
    setToast({
      visible: true,
      message,
      type,
      duration,
    });
  };

  const hideToast = () => {
    setToast(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      visible: false,
    }));
  };

  const showSuccess = (message, duration = 3000) => {
    showToast(message, 'success', duration);
  };

  const showError = (message, duration = 4000) => {
    showToast(message, 'error', duration);
  };

  const showWarning = (message, duration = 3000) => {
    showToast(message, 'warning', duration);
  };

  const showInfo = (message, duration = 3000) => {
    showToast(message, 'info', duration);
  };

  const value = {
    showToast,
    showSuccess,
    showError,
    showWarning,
    showInfo,
    hideToast,
  };

  return (
    <ToastContext.Provider value={value}>
      {children}
      <Toast
        visible={toast.visible}
        message={toast.message}
        type={toast.type}
        duration={toast.duration}
        onHide={hideToast}
      />
    </ToastContext.Provider>
  );
};
```

## **Step 3: Update App.js to Include Toast Provider**


```javascript
import React from 'react';
import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
import { AuthProvider } from './src/contexts/AuthContext';
import { ToastProvider } from './src/contexts/ToastContext';
import AppNavigator from './src/navigation/AppNavigator';

export default function App() {
  return (
    <ToastProvider>
      <AuthProvider>
        <AppNavigator />
        <StatusBar style="auto" />
      </AuthProvider>
    </ToastProvider>
  );
}

```

## **Step 4: Update Login Screen with Toast Messages**


```javascript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  TextInput,
  TouchableOpacity,
  StyleSheet,
  Alert,
  KeyboardAvoidingView,
  Platform,
  ScrollView,
  Dimensions,
} from 'react-native';
import { LinearGradient } from 'expo-linear-gradient';
import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext';
import { useToast } from '../contexts/ToastContext';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows } from '../styles/designSystem';

const LoginScreen = ({ navigation }) => {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const { login } = useAuth();

  const validateForm = () => {
    const newErrors = {};
    
    if (!email.trim()) {
      newErrors.email = 'Email is required';
    } else if (!/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(email)) {
      newErrors.email = 'Please enter a valid email address';
    }
    
    if (!password.trim()) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password is required';
    } else if (password.length < 6) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password must be at least 6 characters';
    }
    
    setErrors(newErrors);
    return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
  };

  const handleLogin = async () => {
    if (!validateForm()) {
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);
    setErrors({});
    
    try {
      const result = await login(email.trim(), password);
      
      if (result.success) {
        Alert.alert('Success', result.message);
        // Navigation will be handled by AuthProvider
      } else {
        Alert.alert('Login Failed', result.message);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'An unexpected error occurred');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const navigateToRegister = () => {
    console.log('🔵 Navigate to Register clicked');
    try {
      navigation.navigate('Register');
      console.log('✅ Navigation to Register successful');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('❌ Navigation to Register failed:', error);
    }
  };

  const { width, height } = Dimensions.get('window');

  return (
    <KeyboardAvoidingView 
      style={styles.container} 
      behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'}
    >
      <ScrollView 
        contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContainer}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Header with Gradient */}
        <LinearGradient
          colors={['#6366F1', '#8B5CF6']}
          style={[styles.header, { height: height * 0.4 }]}
        >
          <View style={styles.headerContent}>
            <Text style={styles.appTitle}>中文词汇</Text>
            <Text style={styles.appSubtitle}>Chinese Vocabulary</Text>
            <Text style={styles.welcomeText}>Welcome Back</Text>
          </View>
        </LinearGradient>

        {/* Form Container */}
        <View style={styles.formContainer}>
          <View style={styles.formCard}>
            <Text style={styles.formTitle}>Sign In</Text>
            <Text style={styles.formSubtitle}>Continue your Chinese learning journey</Text>
            
            <View style={styles.form}>
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Email Address</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.email && styles.inputError]}
                  value={email}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setEmail(text);
                    if (errors.email) {
                      setErrors({...errors, email: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your email"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  keyboardType="email-address"
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                  autoCorrect={false}
                />
                {errors.email && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.email}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.password && styles.inputError]}
                  value={password}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setPassword(text);
                    if (errors.password) {
                      setErrors({...errors, password: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your password"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.password && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.password}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.button, isLoading && styles.buttonDisabled]}
                onPress={handleLogin}
                disabled={isLoading}
                activeOpacity={0.8}
              >
                <LinearGradient
                  colors={isLoading ? [colors.gray400, colors.gray400] : [colors.primary, colors.primaryDark]}
                  style={styles.buttonGradient}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.buttonText}>
                    {isLoading ? 'Signing In...' : 'Sign In'}
                  </Text>
                </LinearGradient>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.footer}>
            <Text style={styles.footerText}>Don't have an account? </Text>
            <TouchableOpacity onPress={navigateToRegister} activeOpacity={0.7}>
              <Text style={styles.linkText}>Create Account</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </KeyboardAvoidingView>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background,
  },
  scrollContainer: {
    flexGrow: 1,
  },
  header: {
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
  },
  headerContent: {
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  appTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['4xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.white,
    marginBottom: spacing.xs,
  },
  appSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.lg,
    color: colors.white,
    opacity: 0.9,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  welcomeText: {
    fontSize: typography.xl,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.white,
  },
  formContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
    paddingTop: spacing.xl,
  },
  formCard: {
    backgroundColor: colors.surface,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,
    padding: spacing.xl,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
    ...shadows.lg,
  },
  formTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['2xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  formSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.xl,
  },
  form: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  inputContainer: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  label: {
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  input: {
    backgroundColor: colors.gray50,
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: colors.gray200,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    padding: spacing.md,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  inputError: {
    borderColor: colors.error,
    backgroundColor: '#FEF2F2',
  },
  errorText: {
    color: colors.error,
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    marginTop: spacing.xs,
    marginLeft: spacing.xs,
  },
  button: {
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    marginTop: spacing.md,
    overflow: 'hidden',
  },
  buttonGradient: {
    padding: spacing.md,
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  buttonDisabled: {
    opacity: 0.6,
  },
  buttonText: {
    color: colors.white,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
  footer: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingVertical: spacing.lg,
  },
  footerText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
  },
  linkText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.primary,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
});

export default LoginScreen;

```

```javascript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  TextInput,
  TouchableOpacity,
  StyleSheet,
  Alert,
  KeyboardAvoidingView,
  Platform,
  ScrollView,
  Dimensions,
} from 'react-native';
import { LinearGradient } from 'expo-linear-gradient';
import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext';
import { useToast } from '../contexts/ToastContext';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows } from '../styles/designSystem';

const LoginScreen = ({ navigation }) => {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const { login } = useAuth();
  const { showSuccess, showError } = useToast();

  const validateForm = () => {
    const newErrors = {};
    
    if (!email.trim()) {
      newErrors.email = 'Email is required';
    } else if (!/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(email)) {
      newErrors.email = 'Please enter a valid email address';
    }
    
    if (!password.trim()) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password is required';
    } else if (password.length < 6) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password must be at least 6 characters';
    }
    
    setErrors(newErrors);
    return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
  };

  const handleLogin = async () => {
    if (!validateForm()) {
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);
    setErrors({});
    
    try {
      const result = await login(email.trim(), password);
      
      if (result.success) {
        Alert.alert('Success', result.message);
        // Navigation will be handled by AuthProvider
      } else {
        Alert.alert('Login Failed', result.message);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'An unexpected error occurred');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const navigateToRegister = () => {
    console.log('🔵 Navigate to Register clicked');
    try {
      navigation.navigate('Register');
      console.log('✅ Navigation to Register successful');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('❌ Navigation to Register failed:', error);
    }
  };

  const { width, height } = Dimensions.get('window');

  return (
    <KeyboardAvoidingView 
      style={styles.container} 
      behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'}
    >
      <ScrollView 
        contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContainer}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Header with Gradient */}
        <LinearGradient
          colors={['#6366F1', '#8B5CF6']}
          style={[styles.header, { height: height * 0.4 }]}
        >
          <View style={styles.headerContent}>
            <Text style={styles.appTitle}>中文词汇</Text>
            <Text style={styles.appSubtitle}>Chinese Vocabulary</Text>
            <Text style={styles.welcomeText}>Welcome Back</Text>
          </View>
        </LinearGradient>

        {/* Form Container */}
        <View style={styles.formContainer}>
          <View style={styles.formCard}>
            <Text style={styles.formTitle}>Sign In</Text>
            <Text style={styles.formSubtitle}>Continue your Chinese learning journey</Text>
            
            <View style={styles.form}>
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Email Address</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.email && styles.inputError]}
                  value={email}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setEmail(text);
                    if (errors.email) {
                      setErrors({...errors, email: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your email"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  keyboardType="email-address"
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                  autoCorrect={false}
                />
                {errors.email && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.email}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.password && styles.inputError]}
                  value={password}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setPassword(text);
                    if (errors.password) {
                      setErrors({...errors, password: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your password"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.password && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.password}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.button, isLoading && styles.buttonDisabled]}
                onPress={handleLogin}
                disabled={isLoading}
                activeOpacity={0.8}
              >
                <LinearGradient
                  colors={isLoading ? [colors.gray400, colors.gray400] : [colors.primary, colors.primaryDark]}
                  style={styles.buttonGradient}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.buttonText}>
                    {isLoading ? 'Signing In...' : 'Sign In'}
                  </Text>
                </LinearGradient>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.footer}>
            <Text style={styles.footerText}>Don't have an account? </Text>
            <TouchableOpacity onPress={navigateToRegister} activeOpacity={0.7}>
              <Text style={styles.linkText}>Create Account</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </KeyboardAvoidingView>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background,
  },
  scrollContainer: {
    flexGrow: 1,
  },
  header: {
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
  },
  headerContent: {
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  appTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['4xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.white,
    marginBottom: spacing.xs,
  },
  appSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.lg,
    color: colors.white,
    opacity: 0.9,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  welcomeText: {
    fontSize: typography.xl,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.white,
  },
  formContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
    paddingTop: spacing.xl,
  },
  formCard: {
    backgroundColor: colors.surface,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,
    padding: spacing.xl,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
    ...shadows.lg,
  },
  formTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['2xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  formSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.xl,
  },
  form: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  inputContainer: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  label: {
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  input: {
    backgroundColor: colors.gray50,
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: colors.gray200,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    padding: spacing.md,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  inputError: {
    borderColor: colors.error,
    backgroundColor: '#FEF2F2',
  },
  errorText: {
    color: colors.error,
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    marginTop: spacing.xs,
    marginLeft: spacing.xs,
  },
  button: {
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    marginTop: spacing.md,
    overflow: 'hidden',
  },
  buttonGradient: {
    padding: spacing.md,
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  buttonDisabled: {
    opacity: 0.6,
  },
  buttonText: {
    color: colors.white,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
  footer: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingVertical: spacing.lg,
  },
  footerText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
  },
  linkText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.primary,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
});

export default LoginScreen;
```

```javascript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  TextInput,
  TouchableOpacity,
  StyleSheet,
  Alert,
  KeyboardAvoidingView,
  Platform,
  ScrollView,
  Dimensions,
} from 'react-native';
import { LinearGradient } from 'expo-linear-gradient';
import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext';
import { useToast } from '../contexts/ToastContext';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows } from '../styles/designSystem';

const LoginScreen = ({ navigation }) => {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const { login } = useAuth();
  const { showSuccess, showError } = useToast();

  const validateForm = () => {
    const newErrors = {};
    
    if (!email.trim()) {
      newErrors.email = 'Email is required';
    } else if (!/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(email)) {
      newErrors.email = 'Please enter a valid email address';
    }
    
    if (!password.trim()) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password is required';
    } else if (password.length < 6) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password must be at least 6 characters';
    }
    
    setErrors(newErrors);
    return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
  };

  const handleLogin = async () => {
    if (!validateForm()) {
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);
    setErrors({});
    
    try {
      const result = await login(email.trim(), password);
      
      if (result.success) {
        showSuccess(result.message);
        // Navigation will be handled by AuthProvider
      } else {
        showError(result.message);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      showError('An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const navigateToRegister = () => {
    console.log('🔵 Navigate to Register clicked');
    try {
      navigation.navigate('Register');
      console.log('✅ Navigation to Register successful');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('❌ Navigation to Register failed:', error);
    }
  };

  const { width, height } = Dimensions.get('window');

  return (
    <KeyboardAvoidingView 
      style={styles.container} 
      behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'}
    >
      <ScrollView 
        contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContainer}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Header with Gradient */}
        <LinearGradient
          colors={['#6366F1', '#8B5CF6']}
          style={[styles.header, { height: height * 0.4 }]}
        >
          <View style={styles.headerContent}>
            <Text style={styles.appTitle}>中文词汇</Text>
            <Text style={styles.appSubtitle}>Chinese Vocabulary</Text>
            <Text style={styles.welcomeText}>Welcome Back</Text>
          </View>
        </LinearGradient>

        {/* Form Container */}
        <View style={styles.formContainer}>
          <View style={styles.formCard}>
            <Text style={styles.formTitle}>Sign In</Text>
            <Text style={styles.formSubtitle}>Continue your Chinese learning journey</Text>
            
            <View style={styles.form}>
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Email Address</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.email && styles.inputError]}
                  value={email}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setEmail(text);
                    if (errors.email) {
                      setErrors({...errors, email: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your email"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  keyboardType="email-address"
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                  autoCorrect={false}
                />
                {errors.email && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.email}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.password && styles.inputError]}
                  value={password}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setPassword(text);
                    if (errors.password) {
                      setErrors({...errors, password: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your password"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.password && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.password}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.button, isLoading && styles.buttonDisabled]}
                onPress={handleLogin}
                disabled={isLoading}
                activeOpacity={0.8}
              >
                <LinearGradient
                  colors={isLoading ? [colors.gray400, colors.gray400] : [colors.primary, colors.primaryDark]}
                  style={styles.buttonGradient}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.buttonText}>
                    {isLoading ? 'Signing In...' : 'Sign In'}
                  </Text>
                </LinearGradient>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.footer}>
            <Text style={styles.footerText}>Don't have an account? </Text>
            <TouchableOpacity onPress={navigateToRegister} activeOpacity={0.7}>
              <Text style={styles.linkText}>Create Account</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </KeyboardAvoidingView>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background,
  },
  scrollContainer: {
    flexGrow: 1,
  },
  header: {
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
  },
  headerContent: {
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  appTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['4xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.white,
    marginBottom: spacing.xs,
  },
  appSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.lg,
    color: colors.white,
    opacity: 0.9,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  welcomeText: {
    fontSize: typography.xl,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.white,
  },
  formContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
    paddingTop: spacing.xl,
  },
  formCard: {
    backgroundColor: colors.surface,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,
    padding: spacing.xl,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
    ...shadows.lg,
  },
  formTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['2xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  formSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.xl,
  },
  form: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  inputContainer: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  label: {
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  input: {
    backgroundColor: colors.gray50,
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: colors.gray200,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    padding: spacing.md,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  inputError: {
    borderColor: colors.error,
    backgroundColor: '#FEF2F2',
  },
  errorText: {
    color: colors.error,
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    marginTop: spacing.xs,
    marginLeft: spacing.xs,
  },
  button: {
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    marginTop: spacing.md,
    overflow: 'hidden',
  },
  buttonGradient: {
    padding: spacing.md,
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  buttonDisabled: {
    opacity: 0.6,
  },
  buttonText: {
    color: colors.white,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
  footer: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingVertical: spacing.lg,
  },
  footerText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
  },
  linkText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.primary,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
});

export default LoginScreen;
```

## **Step 5: Update Register Screen with Toast Messages**


```javascript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  TextInput,
  TouchableOpacity,
  StyleSheet,
  Alert,
  KeyboardAvoidingView,
  Platform,
  ScrollView,
  Dimensions,
} from 'react-native';
import { LinearGradient } from 'expo-linear-gradient';
import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext';
import { useToast } from '../contexts/ToastContext';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows } from '../styles/designSystem';

const RegisterScreen = ({ navigation }) => {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const { register } = useAuth();

  const validateForm = () => {
    const newErrors = {};
    
    if (!email.trim()) {
      newErrors.email = 'Email is required';
    } else if (!/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(email)) {
      newErrors.email = 'Please enter a valid email address';
    }
    
    if (!password.trim()) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password is required';
    } else if (password.length < 6) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password must be at least 6 characters';
    }
    
    if (!confirmPassword.trim()) {
      newErrors.confirmPassword = 'Please confirm your password';
    } else if (password !== confirmPassword) {
      newErrors.confirmPassword = 'Passwords do not match';
    }
    
    setErrors(newErrors);
    return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
  };

  const handleRegister = async () => {
    if (!validateForm()) return;

    setIsLoading(true);
    setErrors({});
    
    try {
      const result = await register(email.trim(), password);
      
      if (result.success) {
        Alert.alert('Success', result.message);
        // Navigation will be handled by AuthProvider
      } else {
        Alert.alert('Registration Failed', result.message);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'An unexpected error occurred');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const navigateToLogin = () => {
    navigation.navigate('Login');
  };

  const { width, height } = Dimensions.get('window');

  return (
    <KeyboardAvoidingView 
      style={styles.container} 
      behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'}
    >
      <ScrollView 
        contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContainer}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Header with Gradient */}
        <LinearGradient
          colors={['#8B5CF6', '#EC4899']}
          style={[styles.header, { height: height * 0.35 }]}
        >
          <View style={styles.headerContent}>
            <Text style={styles.appTitle}>中文词汇</Text>
            <Text style={styles.appSubtitle}>Chinese Vocabulary</Text>
            <Text style={styles.welcomeText}>Join Our Community</Text>
          </View>
        </LinearGradient>

        {/* Form Container */}
        <View style={styles.formContainer}>
          <View style={styles.formCard}>
            <Text style={styles.formTitle}>Create Account</Text>
            <Text style={styles.formSubtitle}>Start your Chinese learning journey today</Text>
            
            <View style={styles.form}>
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Email Address</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.email && styles.inputError]}
                  value={email}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setEmail(text);
                    if (errors.email) {
                      setErrors({...errors, email: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your email"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  keyboardType="email-address"
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                  autoCorrect={false}
                />
                {errors.email && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.email}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.password && styles.inputError]}
                  value={password}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setPassword(text);
                    if (errors.password) {
                      setErrors({...errors, password: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your password (min 6 characters)"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.password && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.password}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Confirm Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.confirmPassword && styles.inputError]}
                  value={confirmPassword}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setConfirmPassword(text);
                    if (errors.confirmPassword) {
                      setErrors({...errors, confirmPassword: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Confirm your password"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.confirmPassword && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.confirmPassword}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.button, isLoading && styles.buttonDisabled]}
                onPress={handleRegister}
                disabled={isLoading}
                activeOpacity={0.8}
              >
                <LinearGradient
                  colors={isLoading ? [colors.gray400, colors.gray400] : ['#8B5CF6', '#EC4899']}
                  style={styles.buttonGradient}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.buttonText}>
                    {isLoading ? 'Creating Account...' : 'Create Account'}
                  </Text>
                </LinearGradient>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.footer}>
            <Text style={styles.footerText}>Already have an account? </Text>
            <TouchableOpacity onPress={navigateToLogin} activeOpacity={0.7}>
              <Text style={styles.linkText}>Sign In</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </KeyboardAvoidingView>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background,
  },
  scrollContainer: {
    flexGrow: 1,
  },
  header: {
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
  },
  headerContent: {
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  appTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['4xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.white,
    marginBottom: spacing.xs,
  },
  appSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.lg,
    color: colors.white,
    opacity: 0.9,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  welcomeText: {
    fontSize: typography.xl,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.white,
  },
  formContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
    paddingTop: spacing.xl,
  },
  formCard: {
    backgroundColor: colors.surface,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,
    padding: spacing.xl,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
    ...shadows.lg,
  },
  formTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['2xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  formSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.xl,
  },
  form: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  inputContainer: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  label: {
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  input: {
    backgroundColor: colors.gray50,
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: colors.gray200,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    padding: spacing.md,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  inputError: {
    borderColor: colors.error,
    backgroundColor: '#FEF2F2',
  },
  errorText: {
    color: colors.error,
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    marginTop: spacing.xs,
    marginLeft: spacing.xs,
  },
  button: {
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    marginTop: spacing.md,
    overflow: 'hidden',
  },
  buttonGradient: {
    padding: spacing.md,
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  buttonDisabled: {
    opacity: 0.6,
  },
  buttonText: {
    color: colors.white,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
  footer: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingVertical: spacing.lg,
  },
  footerText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
  },
  linkText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.primary,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
});

export default RegisterScreen;

```

```javascript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  TextInput,
  TouchableOpacity,
  StyleSheet,
  Alert,
  KeyboardAvoidingView,
  Platform,
  ScrollView,
  Dimensions,
} from 'react-native';
import { LinearGradient } from 'expo-linear-gradient';
import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext';
import { useToast } from '../contexts/ToastContext';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows } from '../styles/designSystem';

const RegisterScreen = ({ navigation }) => {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const { register } = useAuth();
  const { showSuccess, showError } = useToast();

  const validateForm = () => {
    const newErrors = {};
    
    if (!email.trim()) {
      newErrors.email = 'Email is required';
    } else if (!/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(email)) {
      newErrors.email = 'Please enter a valid email address';
    }
    
    if (!password.trim()) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password is required';
    } else if (password.length < 6) {
      newErrors.password = 'Password must be at least 6 characters';
    }
    
    if (!confirmPassword.trim()) {
      newErrors.confirmPassword = 'Please confirm your password';
    } else if (password !== confirmPassword) {
      newErrors.confirmPassword = 'Passwords do not match';
    }
    
    setErrors(newErrors);
    return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
  };

  const handleRegister = async () => {
    if (!validateForm()) return;

    setIsLoading(true);
    setErrors({});
    
    try {
      const result = await register(email.trim(), password);
      
      if (result.success) {
        Alert.alert('Success', result.message);
        // Navigation will be handled by AuthProvider
      } else {
        Alert.alert('Registration Failed', result.message);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'An unexpected error occurred');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const navigateToLogin = () => {
    navigation.navigate('Login');
  };

  const { width, height } = Dimensions.get('window');

  return (
    <KeyboardAvoidingView 
      style={styles.container} 
      behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'}
    >
      <ScrollView 
        contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContainer}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Header with Gradient */}
        <LinearGradient
          colors={['#8B5CF6', '#EC4899']}
          style={[styles.header, { height: height * 0.35 }]}
        >
          <View style={styles.headerContent}>
            <Text style={styles.appTitle}>中文词汇</Text>
            <Text style={styles.appSubtitle}>Chinese Vocabulary</Text>
            <Text style={styles.welcomeText}>Join Our Community</Text>
          </View>
        </LinearGradient>

        {/* Form Container */}
        <View style={styles.formContainer}>
          <View style={styles.formCard}>
            <Text style={styles.formTitle}>Create Account</Text>
            <Text style={styles.formSubtitle}>Start your Chinese learning journey today</Text>
            
            <View style={styles.form}>
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Email Address</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.email && styles.inputError]}
                  value={email}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setEmail(text);
                    if (errors.email) {
                      setErrors({...errors, email: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your email"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  keyboardType="email-address"
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                  autoCorrect={false}
                />
                {errors.email && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.email}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.password && styles.inputError]}
                  value={password}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setPassword(text);
                    if (errors.password) {
                      setErrors({...errors, password: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Enter your password (min 6 characters)"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.password && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.password}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <View style={styles.inputContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.label}>Confirm Password</Text>
                <TextInput
                  style={[styles.input, errors.confirmPassword && styles.inputError]}
                  value={confirmPassword}
                  onChangeText={(text) => {
                    setConfirmPassword(text);
                    if (errors.confirmPassword) {
                      setErrors({...errors, confirmPassword: ''});
                    }
                  }}
                  placeholder="Confirm your password"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.gray400}
                  secureTextEntry
                  autoCapitalize="none"
                />
                {errors.confirmPassword && <Text style={styles.errorText}>{errors.confirmPassword}</Text>}
              </View>
              
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.button, isLoading && styles.buttonDisabled]}
                onPress={handleRegister}
                disabled={isLoading}
                activeOpacity={0.8}
              >
                <LinearGradient
                  colors={isLoading ? [colors.gray400, colors.gray400] : ['#8B5CF6', '#EC4899']}
                  style={styles.buttonGradient}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.buttonText}>
                    {isLoading ? 'Creating Account...' : 'Create Account'}
                  </Text>
                </LinearGradient>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.footer}>
            <Text style={styles.footerText}>Already have an account? </Text>
            <TouchableOpacity onPress={navigateToLogin} activeOpacity={0.7}>
              <Text style={styles.linkText}>Sign In</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </KeyboardAvoidingView>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background,
  },
  scrollContainer: {
    flexGrow: 1,
  },
  header: {
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
  },
  headerContent: {
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  appTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['4xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.white,
    marginBottom: spacing.xs,
  },
  appSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.lg,
    color: colors.white,
    opacity: 0.9,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  welcomeText: {
    fontSize: typography.xl,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.white,
  },
  formContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.lg,
    paddingTop: spacing.xl,
  },
  formCard: {
    backgroundColor: colors.surface,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,
    padding: spacing.xl,
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
    ...shadows.lg,
  },
  formTitle: {
    fontSize: typography['2xl'],
    fontWeight: typography.bold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  formSubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.xl,
  },
  form: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  inputContainer: {
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },
  label: {
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  input: {
    backgroundColor: colors.gray50,
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: colors.gray200,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    padding: spacing.md,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textPrimary,
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  inputError: {
    borderColor: colors.error,
    backgroundColor: '#FEF2F2',
  },
  errorText: {
    color: colors.error,
    fontSize: typography.sm,
    marginTop: spacing.xs,
    marginLeft: spacing.xs,
  },
  button: {
    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,
    marginTop: spacing.md,
    overflow: 'hidden',
  },
  buttonGradient: {
    padding: spacing.md,
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    minHeight: 48,
  },
  buttonDisabled: {
    opacity: 0.6,
  },
  buttonText: {
    color: colors.white,
    fontSize: typography.base,
    fontWeight: typography.semibold,
  },
  footer: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingVertical: spacing.lg,
  },
  footerText: {
    fontSize: typography.base,
    color: colors.textSecondary,
  },
  linkText: {

});
```
